title: MIN 722 (M+F): Clarification of the Basic Health and Safety and Safety Awareness Training Requirements for Fishers.
body: "Notice to all Owners, Operators, Skippers, Crew of Fishing Vessels and all those concerned with training for fishers.  This Notice should be read in conjunction with MSN 1825 and MGN 411 (M+F).  This MIN expires 31 March 2027. "
